view.title: Tigidhada {id}
view.subject: Mawduuca
view.emailDisabled: Iimaylkaaga ({email}) waa la joojiyay. Fadlan la xiriir
view.allowServerAccess: InterServer u ogolow inay server-ka wax ka beddelaan:
view.ipHelpText: Haddii xiriirku ka imaanayo cinwaanka IP ee kala-duwan. Fadlan beddelso.
view.passwordEncrypted: Ereyada sirta ayaa ku kaydsan xogta sirta gaar ah ee encrypted.
view.ticketClosed: Tigidhaddaan waa la xidhay, sidaas darteed jawaabaha waa la joojiyay. Haddaad wali u baahan tahay gargaar, xor ayaad u tahay inaad tigidhad cusub furto oo aan ku faraxsannahay inaan kaa caawino.
view.replyPlaceholder: Faahfaahin qoto dheer oo ku saabsan arrintan
view.replyHint: Abuurista tigidhadaha gaar ah arrimaha cusub ayaa ka caawiya kooxdayada inay si deg-deg ah u mudnaansiiyaan oo u xaliyaan.
view.userLikedReply: Isticmaalaha jawaabta ayuu ka raalli yahay

new.title: Tigidhad Cusub
new.subject: Mawduuca
new.subjectValidation: Fadlan sharaxaad gaaban oo ku saabsan arrintan geli.
new.descriptionPlaceholder: Waad ku mahadsan tahay inaad naga caawiso nidaamka taageerida streamlined-ka adoo gudbinaya hal codsi tigidhad kasta.
new.descriptionValidation: Fadlan sharaxaad qoto dheer oo ku saabsan arrintan geli.
new.fileNote: Xusuus: Kaliya faylasha sawirka - noocyada gif/jpeg/png ayaa la oggol yahay.
new.allowAccessLabel: Waxaan u oggolaynayaa InterServer inay server-kegga gasho oo wax ka beddelaan
new.accessNote: Fadlan ogow: Adoo codsiga taageerida furaya InterServer waxa laga yaabaa inay u baahan tahay inay gasho, saxdo, ama faylasha xisaabtagaaga wax ka beddesho. Shuruuddan waxa loo baahan yahay si loo bixiyo taageero farsameed. Kaliya sii wad haddaad ogolaato.
